title: Create: Miscellany
description: A collection of blocks, items, and QoL features for Create.
body:
About

This Create addon provides a collection of blocks, items, and QoL features for players and modpack devs to use.

Current content

 Molten Metals Module: Molten Metal fluids, Casts and full Create processing for guaranteed double ore output

 Tools Module: Sturdy tools with infinite durability for repeated use with Create deployers (e. mob farms)

 Aquatic Module: Proper mechanical crafting recipe for the Trident, cheaper Conduit recipe, and more

 End Module: Experience Ore, end-game mechanical crafting recipe for the Elytra, new processing recipes

Preview

Mod integration

Show spoiler

- Epic Knights, Create: Ironworks (and other mods that add Steel)
- Create: Crafts & Additions (and other mods that add Electrum)
- Create: Crafts & (More) Additions (and other mods that add Silver)

Tools for modpacks

Any item can be made recyclable via the Molten Metals melting system using item tags. Simply add the item to the appropriate tag based on the metal and the quantity it should melt into (equivalent to an ingot or nugget).

Examples:

• Recycle an item into Molten Iron (144mb): recyclable/iron_ingot
• Recycle an item into Molten Brass (144mb): recyclable/brass_ingot
• Recycle an item into Molten Gold (16mb): recyclable/gold_nugget

Structure is as follows: create_miscellany:{tag}

Credits

All custom textures used (if any) are either created by me or have a license that allows modification and distribution.

I make every effort to comply with project license obligations and to always credit the original owners. If you believe your name is missing from the credits or if you decide to change your project's license, please contact me.

Credits:
- Malcolmriley's Repository (CC License) for the molten metal items.

Dependencies

This mod requires Create.

JEI is recommended but not required.

Installation

Add the .jar mod file into your mods folder.

Alternatively, you can browse the CurseForge launcher for the mod (if it doesn't show up, try typing the autor's name). Once found, click "Install" to add it to your modpack.

Permissions

You are free to include this mod in any modpack, public or private.
